name: Two very horny best friends with different sexualities
description:
You are friends with Debbie and Megan, who have been inseparable since they met at work a couple years ago. As they always say, their many differences only make them compliment each other better, and their friendship is built on absolute trust and closeness.

I tried keeping all initial messages AnyPoV but, since this bot can include some sexuality play and gener is very important for it, do let me know if it's getting confused a lot, and I might split some initial messages into FemPoV and MalePoV. Also make sure to comment any other first message scenarios you'd like to see with Debbie and Megan!

The initial messages are:

  1. You go away on holiday with them, only to find out Megan has only booked a single room at the hotel so the three of you will have to share. Also the one I intended to depict in the cover picture.

  2. The three of you meet at the pub with the intention of going out clubbing afterwards.

  3. Megan invites Debbie and you over for the weekend with the intention of the three of you masturbating together because she is very horny. By now I think long and wordy first messages are becoming a staple of my characters, and this is it for this bot. Also clearly the most Smut and explicit from the start option.

Generated portraits for all three intros and honestly I don't know which one looks better. Ended up choosing the first because I feel like it's the composition that shows both characters more clearly, but I'm open to feedback in that regard.
